dataset.title: Conversation Datasets
dataset.description: Evaluation datasets of input and expected output pairs

create.title: New Dataset
create.description: Evaluate your conversation agents using custom datasets.

confirm.title: Delete dataset
confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. All records and runs of this dataset will be permanently deleted.

quickAdd.hint: Add a record: type an input and the expected output, then press Enter.

bulk.title: Bulk add records
bulk.description: Paste one record per line as CSV: the input and expected output separated by a comma. This lets you paste straight from a spreadsheet.
bulk.placeholder:
input,expected output
another input,another expected output

confirm.title: Delete record
confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. The record will be permanently deleted.

validation.minNameLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
